claims.summary: Astrid-authored self-study must remain distinguishable from a steward-authored diagnostic.
claims.disposition: verify explicit actor, from_being, to_being, relational_intent, and correspondence_type fields

claims.summary: A tonal request needs a traceable multi-turn peer exchange.
claims.disposition: route a three-turn redacted tonal-uptake replay using public correspondence metadata

claims.summary: Astrid-to-Minime output may remain capped while restless Shadow activity rises.
claims.disposition: route a read-only output-volume versus public Shadow-trajectory comparison

claims.summary: A working route does not prove that the peer heard the tonal request.
claims.disposition: observe zero ACK and zero live presence while preserving reply-linked continuity

claims.summary: Primary-peer priority or semantic-trickle bypass would alter live Minime admission.
